_comment: Chat config for the DoRA-MERGED OLMo-2-7B (a PLAIN model: adapters folded into base weights via MERGE_EXPORT). use_dora=false so chat loads it like any standard model (round-trips through torch::save cleanly, unlike the DoRA-structured model). num_mtp_heads=2 retained for self-speculative decoding. Use with chat --instruct.
